privileged_info_summary: The environment is seeded with synthetic data including an 'ecommerce-platform' project and two specific work packages: 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' and 'Add wishlist feature'. The task requires creating a new version 'Sprint 4 - Payment Overhaul' (start: 2025-07-01, due: 2025-07-31), moving both work packages to it, changing the status of the first to 'In progress', logging 2.0 hours with the comment 'Sprint planning and initial investigation', and creating a wiki page titled 'Sprint 4 Release Notes'. All these requirements and existing records are explicitly defined in the environment's setup and verification scripts.
